## Feature / Enhancement Request

**Summary**
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you would like to see -->

**Motivation**
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what value does it add? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- Describe the solution you have in mind. How should this feature work? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them here -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or references that may help explain the request -->
